actions.name: Dagger
desc: mw 4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage.

actions.name: Sling
desc: rw 4 to hit, range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Dagger
desc: mw 4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage.

actions.name: Sling
desc: rw 4 to hit, range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Dagger
desc: mw 5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) piercing damage.

actions.name: Dropped Rock
desc: rw 5 to hit, one target directly below the kobold. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Multiattack
desc: The owlbear makes two attacks: one with its beak and one with its claws.

actions.name: Beak
desc: mw 7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 10 (1d10 + 5) piercing damage.

actions.name: Claws
desc: mw 7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) slashing damage.

actions.name: Multiattack
desc: The snake makes two attacks: one with its bite and one with its tail.

actions.name: Bite
desc: mw 3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 3 (1d4 + 1) piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) fire damage.

actions.name: Tail
desc: mw 3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 3 (1d4 + 1) bludgeoning damage plus 3 (1d6) fire damage.

actions.name: Bite
desc: mw 4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) fire damage.

actions.name: Scalding Breath {@recharge}
desc: The fume drake exhales a 15-foot cone of scalding steam. Each creature in that area must make a 11 Dexterity saving throw, taking 4 (1d8) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
